videos.title: HTML Lists Tutorial
videos.description: Complete tutorial on HTML unordered, ordered, and description lists with examples.

videos.title: Learn HTML Lists in 6 Minutes
videos.description: Kyle covers everything about HTML lists including nesting and styling in just 6 minutes.

videos.title: CSS List Style Tutorial
videos.description: Kevin explains CSS list styling including markers, positions, and custom bullet designs.

videos.title: HTML Lists and Navigation Menus
videos.description: Brad shows how to build navigation menus using HTML lists with proper styling.

videos.title: HTML Description Lists
videos.description: Deep dive into description lists, when to use them, and how to style them effectively.

videos.title: CSS Counters and Custom List Numbering
videos.description: Learn advanced CSS counter techniques for customizing ordered list numbering.
